name: bakin-bits-official-build-sdk
description: Build-only install of the real @makinbakin/sdk so scripts/build-plugins.ts can bundle the SDK into server bundles. Tests resolve @makinbakin/sdk to the file:./test-sdk stub. NOTE: pin below MUST be repointed to the published rc carrying the conversation kit (>= the one that ships ConversationPanel/useConversationStream/conversationThreadId/createTurnRecorder) before this builds in CI/release.
